evals.expected_output: Generated scaffold files for a Next.js fullstack project
expectations: Generates CLAUDE.md with Next.js-specific content (not generic template)
Recommends superpowers plugin for TDD and debugging
Recommends context7 plugin for Next.js and Prisma docs
Does NOT generate a custom debug skill (superpowers covers it)
Creates test-engineer agent for vitest + playwright
Generates .mcp.json with postgres MCP server
Generates .cursor/rules/project-context.mdc for Cursor
Generates AGENTS.md for Codex
Generates Prisma db-migrate custom skill (no official equivalent)
Safety rules are generated for both Claude Code and Cursor

evals.expected_output: Generated scaffold files for a Python FastAPI project
expectations: Detects Python and FastAPI correctly
Generates CLAUDE.md mentioning FastAPI and pytest
Recommends superpowers plugin
Generates validate-api skill for OpenAPI spec
Recommends ruff linting hook if ruff detected
AGENTS.md contains Python-specific conventions

evals.expected_output: Minimal scaffold for a simple project
expectations: Generates only CLAUDE.md and safety rules (not bloated)
Does NOT create unnecessary agents
Does NOT create skills for non-existent commands
Recommends superpowers as the only plugin
Total files generated is fewer than 8

evals.expected_output: Official plugins recommended before custom skills
expectations: Explicitly recommends superpowers plugin by name
Explicitly recommends hookify plugin by name
Does NOT generate a custom debugging skill
Does NOT generate a custom TDD skill
Does NOT generate a custom code-review skill
Custom skills are ONLY for project-specific workflows

evals.expected_output: Audit report identifying stale or broken setup files
expectations: Scans .claude/ directory for existing files
Checks skills reference actual commands from package.json
Identifies any MCP servers for services not in project
Reports findings categorized as Critical, Warning, or Info
Offers to fix issues found

evals.expected_output: AGENTS.md generated in correct Codex format
expectations: Generates AGENTS.md at project root
AGENTS.md contains Development Commands section with actual commands
AGENTS.md contains Architecture section
AGENTS.md contains Agent Instructions section
AGENTS.md does NOT contain Claude Code-specific references
Detects monorepo structure (turbo.json or pnpm-workspace.yaml)
Creates scoped agents per package boundary if distinct areas exist
CLAUDE.md documents the monorepo structure and package responsibilities
Rules include monorepo boundary guidance
Does NOT treat the monorepo as a single flat project

evals.expected_output: Audit detects duplicate rules across Claude Code and Cursor
expectations: Identifies rules with identical content in .claude/rules/ and .cursor/rules/
Flags agents with overlapping responsibilities
Reports duplicate count in the summary
Suggests consolidation or removal for duplicates

evals.expected_output: Quality reviewer catches any hallucinated or incorrect content
expectations: Does NOT recommend MCP servers for services not detected in the project
Generated CLAUDE.md does not mention frameworks the project does not use
Skills reference only commands that actually exist in the project
No placeholder or TODO content appears in generated files
